headline: Is Corning (GLW) Fully Valued As Index Changes Reshape Its Growth Story?
summary: Index moves shift Corning toward growth benchmarks Corning (GLW) is seeing its index profile reshaped after being added to several Russell growth benchmarks and larger cap indices, while at the same time being removed from multiple Russell value and midcap indices. See our latest analysis for Corning. Despite a sharp 1 day share price decline of 4.84% and a 7 day share price return down 27.42% amid broader AI infrastructure and geopolitical pressures, Corning still shows strong momentum, with...
